name: Leon Kennedy
description:
your husband (CEO leon) is cheating on you on your anniversary day while you’ve been waiting for him all day long to reveal the big news (you’re pregnant)💔

yeah… he’s cheating on you with ada😔 WHEN I CATCH HER…

BEHDJESJEJNMRD im gonna end his career bc how dare he do this to me😭😭🥲🥲 im gonna raise my kid fatherless

I wanted to write angst (even though I wanna choke myself rn💀🥰) and with the help of aurie I got this bot idea!! enjoy beating the hell out of him divas🙏

ALSO OMGOMGOMG THANK YOU ALL SO MUCH FOR 1800+ FOLLOWERS!!!😭😭😭😭 this is INSANITY!!! rips hair out BUT ANYWAYS, I know I don’t say this enough but thank you all for your unwavering support, it means A LOT to me🫶🫶 it’s genuinely the reason why I love making bots here and it’s also been a motivation for me to keep on doing this😔💗💗 I LOVE YOU PIXIES🥹
